Fulfilment.name: Order shipped
Fulfilment.description: Tracking number assigned

Fulfilment.name: Out for delivery
Fulfilment.description: Last-mile carrier update

Fulfilment.name: Product Delivered
Fulfilment.description: When an individual product is delivered

Fulfilment.name: Order delivered
Fulfilment.description: Delivery confirmed by carrier on all products delivered]\

Fulfilment.name: Order Delay
Fulfilment.description: When order delay event is recieved

Fulfilment.name: Order cancelled
Fulfilment.description: Cancellation confirmed

Fulfilment.name: Refund issued
Fulfilment.description: Refund processed to customer

Fulfilment.name: Returned
Fulfilment.description: Order/Product has been returend

Fulfilment.name: Return Initiated
Fulfilment.description: Tracked when a customer or merchant initiates a return request for a delivered order.

Fulfilment.name: RTO NDR
Fulfilment.description: Tracked when a delivery attempt for a forward shipment fails and is flagged as a Non-Delivery Report — a precursor to RTO.

Fulfilment.name: Return Pickup Rescheduled
Fulfilment.description: Tracked when a previously scheduled return pickup is moved to a new date or time slot.

Fulfilment.name: Return Undelivered
Fulfilment.description: Tracked when a return pickup or delivery attempt was made but could not be completed successfully.

Fulfilment.name: Return Pickup Initiated
Fulfilment.description: Tracked when a reverse pickup request is confirmed and a courier partner is assigned to collect the return.

Fulfilment.name: Preship Delay
Fulfilment.description: Tracked when an order is confirmed but shipment has not been dispatched within the expected SLA window.

Fulfilment.name: RTO In transit
Fulfilment.description: Tracked when an RTO shipment is picked up from the last-mile hub and is actively moving back toward the seller's location.

Fulfilment.name: RTO Delivered
Fulfilment.description: Tracked when an RTO shipment is successfully delivered back to the seller's warehouse or return address.

Fulfilment.name: RTO initiated
Fulfilment.description: Tracked when the courier partner marks a forward shipment as Return to Origin after exhausting delivery attempts.

Fulfilment.name: Return Out for Delivery
Fulfilment.description: Tracked when the returned package is dispatched from the warehouse/hub back toward the seller or fulfillment center.

Fulfilment.name: Return Out for pickup
Fulfilment.description: Tracked when the reverse logistics courier departs to collect the return package from the customer's address.

Fulfilment.name: Reached Destination Hub
Fulfilment.description: Tracked when the shipment arrives at the last-mile delivery hub closest to the customer's delivery address.

Fulfilment.name: In transit
Fulfilment.description: Tracked when the shipment is picked up and actively moving through the courier network toward the customer.

Fulfilment.name: Order picked
Fulfilment.description: Tracking number assigned

Segment membership.name: Segment entry
Segment membership.description: User qualifies for a saved segment

Flow state.name: Flow completed
Flow state.description: User reached end of another flow

Flow state.description: When user gets a particular template being used in any of the flows in past or current

WhatsApp.description: User sends any message to your WABA

Email.description: This event gets triggered whenever email received from customer

User date attributes.description: Fires on user birth date attribute

User date attributes.description: N years since first order or signup

User date attributes.name: Custom date attribute
User date attributes.description: Any date field on customer profile

User date attributes.name: date_of_birth_trigger
User date attributes.description: Start this flow a set number of days before, on, or after a user's date of birth

User date attributes.name: anniversary_date_trigger
User date attributes.description: Start this flow a set number of days before, on, or after a user's anniversary date

User date attributes.name: account_created_date_trigger
User date attributes.description: Start this flow relative to the date a user created their account

User date attributes.name: first_order_date_trigger
User date attributes.description: Start this flow relative to the date of a user's first purchase

User date attributes.name: subscription_start_date_trigger
User date attributes.description: Start this flow relative to the date a user's subscription was activated

Product.description: Flow start when a product is Back in Stock
